MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS MUHAMMED ZUGHAIYIR, OASIS GRILL, LLC, AND MUNA AZZGHAYER's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Please re-set this demurrer in department 501, which hears cases involving a breach of lease per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Please provide courtesy copies to that department per SF Local Rule 2.7B.
